audience: non-technical founders, solo builders, agencies, and vibe coders
user_project_context: The user wants to build a working MVP quickly, avoid unfinished vibe-code projects, understand launch readiness, and pick the right no-code/AI builder based on pain points.
source_text: Seed evidence placeholder.
